scripts.test:doc: cargo test -p fastmulp-core --doc --locked && cargo test -p fastmulp-wasm --doc --locked
scripts.ci:local: cargo metadata --locked --format-version 1 >/dev/null && pnpm fmt:check && pnpm check && pnpm check:wasm && pnpm lint && pnpm test && pnpm test:doc && pnpm test:node-binding && pnpm test:wasm-binding
scripts.package:core: cargo package -p fastmulp-core --locked --allow-dirty --list && cargo publish -p fastmulp-core --locked --allow-dirty --dry-run
scripts.package:bindings: pnpm build:node && pnpm build:wasm && node scripts/package-bindings.mjs --dry-run
